zh.Newminster Abbey, Northumberland, Englan: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger II Merlay於大約1173年出生在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯時，他的父親Roger l Merlay30歲，母親Alice Stuteville31歲。他和Ada of Fife至少有2個兒子。他去世於1239年4月10日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger II Merlay于大约1173年出生在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯时，他的父亲Roger l Merlay30岁，母亲Alice Stuteville31岁。他和Ada of Fife至少有2个儿子。他去世于1239年4月10日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Merlay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger II Merlay was born about 1173, in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, his father, Roger l Merlay, was 30 and his mother, Alice Stuteville, was 31. He had at least 2 sons with Ada of Fife. He died before 10 April 1239, in his hometown, and was buried in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Ada of Fife. Il est décédé avant 10 avril 1239, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger II Merlay um 1173 in Morpeth, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger l Merlay 30 und seine Mutter Alice Stuteville 31. Er hatte mit Ada of Fife mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 10. April 1239 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Ada of Fife. Morì prima del 10 aprile 1239, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger II Merlayが約1173年にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスで生まれた時，父Roger l Merlayは30歳，母Alice Stutevilleは31歳であった。彼はAda of Fifeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1239年4月10日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Newminster Abbey, Northumberland, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Roger II Merlay(이)가 대략 1173년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger l Merlay(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Stuteville(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Ada of Fife(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1239년 4월 10일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger II Merlay nasceu aproximadamente 1173, em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger l Merlay, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Stuteville, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Ada of Fife. Ele faleceu antes 10 de abril de 1239, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger II Merlay родился около 1173 г. в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger l Merlay было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Stuteville, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Ada of Fife. Он умер перед 10 апрель 1239 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности нюминстир эбби, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.
